recommendations.title: Pinocchio
recommendations.overview: Roberto Benigni adapts the classic children's tale by Carlo Collodi for the big-budget family-oriented comedy Pinocchio.

recommendations.title: Nothing Left to Do But Cry
recommendations.overview: Two 20th-century friends accidentally stumble into the year 1492, where they meet a charming teen and try to alter history.

recommendations.title: The Little Devil

recommendations.title: Johnny Stecchino

recommendations.title: The Monster

recommendations.title: Berlinguer: I Love You
recommendations.overview: A young poet falls in love with a sophisticated woman who hates poetry. But the poet wants to win her with poetry — and a bit of help from his mum.

recommendations.title: All Quiet on the Western Front

recommendations.title: A Farewell to Arms

recommendations.title: Chemical Hearts
recommendations.overview: When a hopelessly romantic high school senior falls for a mysterious new classmate, it sets them both on an unexpected journey that teaches them about love, loss, and most importantly themselves.
